description_long: This object is a hot-air balloon with a large, rounded envelope featuring a predominantly white and yellow color scheme. The envelope is decorated with printed text, diagrams, and cartoon-like illustrations, resembling educational or instructional material. The surface appears to be made of a lightweight, flexible fabric, likely nylon or polyester, with a matte finish. There is a flat, rectangular base attached to the bottom, which may represent a simplified or stylized basket, but no traditional wicker basket is visible. The balloon lacks visible suspension cables or burner frame components. The overall design is more illustrative and abstract than realistic, with no clear registration markings or identification codes.
description: A rounded hot-air balloon with a white and yellow envelope covered in educational text and illustrations, attached to a flat base. The design is abstract and lacks a traditional basket or suspension cables.
description_view_0: The balloon's envelope is seen from the side, showing the most text and a small illustration on the flat base below.
description_view_1: A side angle reveals the curvature of the envelope and the continuation of the yellow and white pattern, with less visible text.
description_view_2: The top-down view highlights the full roundness of the envelope and the symmetrical layout of the printed text and graphics.
description_view_3: Another side angle, similar to view 1, showing the envelope's curvature and partial text, with the flat base visible below.
attribute_envelope_pattern: The envelope is covered with printed educational text, diagrams, and cartoon illustrations, arranged in panels with a white and yellow background. There are no stripes, gradients, or traditional balloon patterns; the design is dominated by instructional graphics.
